opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The lump in my neck has suddenly doubled in size this week, my voice has gone completely gravelly, and food is getting stuck in my throat.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump has grown really fast over the last week and tonight I'm getting short of breath and a choking feeling when I lie down — I can't sleep flat.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had a lump in the front of my neck for about six months, but it had been steady and painless — then over the last week it suddenly got much bigger
symptom_narrative.duration: the lump six months, the rapid growth about seven days, the voice change and swallowing trouble came on over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.character: a hard lump low in the front of my neck; my voice has gone deep and gravelly; solid food feels like it catches or gets stuck
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's frightening how fast it's changed; tonight the breathing and choking feeling when I lie down is the worst part
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my neck, more on the right side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the growth and voice change have been steady and getting worse; the choking feeling is worse when I lie flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up and leaning forward eases the breathing a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat brings on the choking sensation and breathlessness; swallowing solid food makes it catch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: hoarse voice, food sticking, breathlessness and a choking feeling lying down; no pain in the lump
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, the lump has just sat there quietly for months until this week
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't lie down to sleep — I've been propped up on pillows; I'm avoiding solid food because it catches

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a painless lump in the neck that's been there about six months
past_medical_history.how_managed: hadn't done anything about it because it wasn't sore and wasn't changing

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: had radiation treatment to my head and neck as a child, decades ago, for a benign condition
past_medical_history.how_managed: treated at the time; nothing since

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who is present and worried about the fast change and the breathing tonight

objective_data_offered.value: a visible firm lump low in the front of the neck, larger on the right, that looks bigger than it did last week
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/spouse description over video; cannot be measured or palpated remotely

objective_data_offered.value: distinctly hoarse, gravelly voice audible throughout the call
reports becoming breathless and getting a choking sensation when lying flat, and is sitting propped up leaning slightly forward
spouse reports the lump has clearly grown over the week and that the voice change and choking-when-flat are new; extra pillows stacked so she can sleep upright
